label: 第164話
source_locator: 単行本19巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 虎杖は日車を見つけ、得点移動の規則追加を求めるが拒まれる。日車の領域展開「誅伏賜死」が発動し、虎杖は過去の行為を裁かれる。
summary_full: 虎杖は日車へ、得点を使って泳者間の得点移動を可能にする総則を追加してほしいと頼む。日車は人を殺した経験によって法の重みから解放されたと語り、要求を拒否する。虎杖が実力行使へ移ると、日車は領域展開「誅伏賜死」を発動する。領域内では暴力が禁じられ、式神ジャッジマンが虎杖を未成年時のパチンコ店入店について起訴する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 has successfully tracked down 日車寛見 but he's failed to convince him to add a rule to the 死滅回游 . Instead, 悠仁 finds himself on trial against the lawyer and the judgement may be fatal!
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 日車 immediately activates 領域展開：誅伏賜死. 日車 defiantly faces his opponent and 悠仁 takes note of the 式神 appearing by his side. 悠仁 knows 日車 has eliminated at least twenty players and decides to stay on the defensive to anticipate an attack. 日車 unexpectedly activates 領域展開：誅伏賜死 right away. 日車's domain reflects a courtroom with guillotines in the background and 悠仁 is alert to the imminent danger. 悠仁 rushes 日車 and tries to attack before the 術式 imbued into the domain activates. 悠仁 throws a head kick but his foot stops right before it can reach his opponent. 日車 explains that his domain forbids the use of violence on either side and 悠仁 is transported back to his end of the courtroom. The 式神, ジャッジマン , begins by stating that 悠仁 is under suspicion of entering the Maji Vegas Pachinko Parlor on July 16, 2017, in 仙台市 , despite being underage. 悠仁 isn't sure what's happening at first until he remembers the parlor ジャッジマン is referring to. Before 悠仁 makes it obvious he's been there, he backtracks and acts like he's still thinking. 日車 explains that ジャッジマン knows everything about everyone in the domain. 日車 himself is not pricey to all of this information and the verdict is decided solely by the arguments presented in the courtroom. Additionally, 日車 has evidence that's been submitted for deliberation by ジャッジマン. It's not necessarily conclusive but 悠仁 won't be informed of what's inside either. 悠仁's goal is to defend his case and dispel all doubt to win an innocent verdict from ジャッジマン. 日車 and ジャッジマン put 悠仁 on trial. The trial-based 術式 makes 悠仁 realize he's being prosecuted by an actual lawyer. The absence of a fatal attack in 日車's domain makes 悠仁 recall 天元様 's advice. 天元 explained that 領域展開 was a more common technique for sorcerers of the past because they didn't incorporate guaranteed hits. Casting one's domain was used to simply force the targets inside to obey the rules of their 術式. Constructing a domain with a can't-miss attack requires a lot of skill and the number of users heavily decreased over time. 悠仁 surmises that 日車's domain is this type, meaning it isn't necessarily lethal. It can't physically harm 悠仁 and relies on the condition that Higiruma explains the rules beforehand. *So I'm innocent! Continuing to explain said rules, 日車 says that both participants each have one chance to make a statement. 悠仁 will go first and then 日車 will rebuttal based on the evidence he received. Once both parties have made their case, ジャッジマン will deliver a verdict. 悠仁 asks what happens if he's found guilty but 日車 isn't sure how to answer that question. Instead, he tells 悠仁 he has one of three options as a response: silence, confession, denial. A denial can include false statements, surprising 悠仁, who asks if it's fine that he lies in court. 日車 points out there would be no need for trials if everyone was honest and asks that 悠仁 hurry and make his statement because ジャッジマン is impatient. ジャッジマン finds 悠仁 guilty. 悠仁 takes a moment to think about how to properly defend himself in this trial. He actually did go into the pachinko parlor that day and even won on the machines. This means that lying is his way to get off clean but he isn't sure what the evidence is. He considers the three main options 日車 gave him one by one. In the first hypothetical, if the evidence isn't necessarily conclusive and doesn't prove 悠仁 went into the parlor, he can just remain silent. In the second, if the evidence only proves 悠仁 went inside the parlor, he could deny the charges and say he was using the bathroom. However, he'll end up admitting he went inside if the evidence doesn't prove he went inside. Three, if the evidence proves he went inside and that he played then 悠仁 believes that he's out of luck completely. He considers confessing for a lighter sentence but isn't sure if trials even allow for that type of scenario. 悠仁 decides to go with the second option and claims he only went inside to use the bathroom. 日車 retorts with the evidence, which is a photo of 悠仁 inside using a cash exchange. While 悠仁 facepalms, 日車 adds that pairing the picture with the defendant's own admission of entering the parlor puts his story about using the restroom into question. 日車 states that it's certain that 悠仁 entered the parlor with the intent of playing the machines. 悠仁 asks what law he's breaking and 日車 replies that the premises expressly forbids entry to minors. There aren't any laws for entertainment establishments punishing minors, but this is still considered unlawful entry. 悠仁 realizes that his 呪力 has been confiscated. 悠仁 states this is an unfair trial because there's nothing he could've said to win an innocent verdict. However, 日車 reveals that Japan only forbids minors to gamble, meaning cash exchanges are separate entities. The evidence only shows 悠仁 at a cash exchange, so he only needed to deny the charges by saying he's never seen the Maji Vegas Pachinko Parlor before. ジャッジマン reaches the verdict and finds 悠仁 guilty, sentencing him to "confiscation". The domain is dispelled and ジャッジマン disappears, but 悠仁 doesn't feel any different. 日車 immediately attacks by throwing his gavel, hitting 悠仁's arm and dealing more damage than it should. 日車 closes the distance and summons his gavel back to his hand. He charges it with 呪力 to increase its size and smashes through 悠仁's defense. 悠仁 gets sent crashing through several seats in the theater, noting that 日車's 術式 can also manipulate the gavel. 悠仁 gets back up and realizes that even worse, he's lost the ability to manipulate 呪力. 日車 admits 悠仁 is tough for withstanding his assault so far and the 呪術高専 student agrees that's one thing he's got going for him.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 日車寛見 天元 (回想)
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 死滅回游 虎杖悠仁 vs. 日車寛見 (開始) 虎杖悠仁 vs. 日車寛見 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 日車寛見の術式 領域展開：誅伏賜死／式神 ジャッジマン

key_events_verified_phase9: 虎杖が日車へ総則追加を要求する
日車が要求を拒否する
日車が誅伏賜死を展開する
虎杖がパチンコ店への不法侵入で裁判を受ける
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
